visa_types.name: Business Or Conference
visa_types.documents_required:
Please prepare and arrange documents according to the checklists below, also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection (https://www.vfsvisaonline.com/Global-Passporttracking/Track/Index?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/A9+3ayKh2o6XUmXfdhngCZMkeebgThxlOcAz1iM6U0oUCviM/LAvFach2tJUkJCJw==)

Business
Culture or Sports
Sweden Visa Application Form - English
Sweden Visa Application Form - Swedish
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
- The Visa fee, according to Schengen regulations, is non-refundable.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table: Business Or Conference]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable.
Please click here (https://www.swedenabroad.se/en/about-sweden-non-swedish-citizens/iran/going-to-sweden/fees/) for other exceptions to the visa fee

[Table:Tourist]
- There is a service charge levied per application above the visa fees.
- The Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost.
- The fees are non-refundable.
- Photocopying
- Photograph service
- Courier service
- SMS Service
- Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/jpn/en/swe/additional-services) for more information on the optional service.
- All charges (Visa Fee, VFS service charges and other charges) are to be paid in cash or with credit card (visa/master) in Japanese Yen.
visa_types.processing_time:
The processing time is 15 days. The period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed.
Non-Japanese residents who wants to apply for Schengen visa, according to the Visa Codex article 6.1, please submit your visa application in the country where you are residing. If applicants still want to submit their applications in Tokyo, they should be aware that the applications might be rejected or dismissed and no refund of the application fee.
Individuals can apply at VFS Tokyo if they hold legal residence permit in Japan.

OR

- Save the form on your computer
visa_types.overview:
Overview
A business visa is granted for those who are visiting Sweden for business or conference meetings.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A business visa is granted for those who are visiting Sweden for business or conference meetings.

## Visa Fees

[Table: Business Or Conference]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable.
Please click here (https://www.swedenabroad.se/en/about-sweden-non-swedish-citizens/iran/going-to-sweden/fees/) for other exceptions to the visa fee

[Table:Tourist]
- There is a service charge levied per application above the visa fees.
- The Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost.
- The fees are non-refundable.
- Photocopying
- Photograph service
- Courier service
- SMS Service
- Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/jpn/en/swe/additional-services) for more information on the optional service.
- All charges (Visa Fee, VFS service charges and other charges) are to be paid in cash or with credit card (visa/master) in Japanese Yen.

## Documents Required
Please prepare and arrange documents according to the checklists below, also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection (https://www.vfsvisaonline.com/Global-Passporttracking/Track/Index?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/A9+3ayKh2o6XUmXfdhngCZMkeebgThxlOcAz1iM6U0oUCviM/LAvFach2tJUkJCJw==)

Business
Culture or Sports
Sweden Visa Application Form - English
Sweden Visa Application Form - Swedish
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
- The Visa fee, according to Schengen regulations, is non-refundable.

## Photo Specifications
 A Photograph submitted with the application form should comply with the following specifications:

- 1 Color photographs printed on normal photographic paper
- Passport sized 45mm x 35mm or 2 inches
- White background
- Taken not later than 6 months
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- In sharp focus and clear of high quality with no ink marks or creases
- Should be without sunglasses, hat or cap
Remarks: The above photograph requirement also applies to minors from 0-11 years old.

## Processing Time
The processing time is 15 days. The period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed.
Non-Japanese residents who wants to apply for Schengen visa, according to the Visa Codex article 6.1, please submit your visa application in the country where you are residing. If applicants still want to submit their applications in Tokyo, they should be aware that the applications might be rejected or dismissed and no refund of the application fee.
Individuals can apply at VFS Tokyo if they hold legal residence permit in Japan.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Application Form (English) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2CE9Nlw9OaqYPa5Sq9zzRb/b2dcba3fe0f23cc7991382b449678266/application_form_japan_new_english.pdf) 
Schengen Visa Application Form (Swedish) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1Pa6BnplmaCTw0Fuq7pnfM/4ddf4a379a0e0ae91143c8da92c299f7/sweden_visaapplication_form_swedish.pdf) 

To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link.
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Sweden for tourism and sightseeing without having an invitation from a Swedish reference.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Sweden for tourism and sightseeing without having an invitation from a Swedish reference.

## Visa Fees

[Table: Tourist]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable.
Please click here (https://www.swedenabroad.se/en/about-sweden-non-swedish-citizens/iran/going-to-sweden/fees/) for other exceptions to the visa fee

[Table:Tourist]
- There is a service charge levied per application above the visa fees.
- The Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost.
- The fees are non-refundable.
- Photocopying
- Photograph service
- Courier service
- SMS Service
- Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/jpn/en/swe/additional-services) for more information on the optional service.
- All charges (Visa Fee, VFS service charges and other charges) are to be paid in cash or with credit card (visa/master) in Japanese Yen.

## Documents Required
Please prepare and arrange documents according to this Checklist , also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection (https://www.vfsvisaonline.com/Global-Passporttracking/Track/Index?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/A9+3ayKh2o6XUmXfdhngCZMkeebgThxlOcAz1iM6U0oUCviM/LAvFach2tJUkJCJw==).
Sweden Visa Application Form - English
Sweden Visa Application Form - Swedish
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
- The Visa fee, according to Schengen regulations, is non-refundable.

## Photo Specifications
 A Photograph submitted with the application form should comply with the following specifications:

- 1 Color photographs printed on normal photographic paper
- Passport sized 45mm x 35mm or 2 inches
- White background
- Taken not later than 6 months
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- In sharp focus and clear of high quality with no ink marks or creases
- Should be without sunglasses, hat or cap
Remarks: The above photograph requirement also applies to minors from 0-11 years old.

## Processing Time
The processing time is 15 days. The period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed.
Non-Japanese residents who wants to apply for Schengen visa, according to the Visa Codex article 6.1, please submit your visa application in the country where you are residing. If applicants still want to submit their applications in Tokyo, they should be aware that the applications might be rejected or dismissed and no refund of the application fee.
Individuals can apply at VFS Tokyo if they hold legal residence permit in Japan.

visa_types.name: Visa Types
visa_types.overview:
- Tourist
- Visit Family/Friends
- Business or Conference
Required documents for all visa types
Please note that the following essentials must be met by all applicants submitting their applications for visa.
Passport or other valid travel document should be valid at least three months beyond the planned departure from Sweden. Please note that The Embassy of Sweden in Bangkok does not accept additional pages inserted into passports. Ensure Passport has at least two blank pages to which a visa can be affixed, if not a new passport must be obtained before submitting your application.
Relevant Forms & Photograph Fully completed application form appropriate to the type of visa and supplementary form requested with two original passport-size photographs [NB: digital photographs not acceptable]
Other Information:
Visa for Applicants under the age of 18
- In addition to the compulsory documentation required, the following documentation is required for applicants under the age of 18.
- The application form needs to be signed by a legal custodian
- Birth certificate for the applicant
- Consent from both parents to travel abroad. If the applicant is under custody of only one parent a certificate showing this is required. The documentation needs to be in original and issued by the legal Thai authorities. The document needs to be in original and issued by the legal authority.
Required Travel Insurance
A medical insurance is compulsory for visitors to Sweden and other Schengen states. You may provide either a policy from an insurance company based in Europe or in Thailand. Please note that only certain insurance companies in Thailand are accepted. The insurance must cover at least 30,000 Euro or 1,500,000 Baht…’ Refer to information on the Embassy’s website.
Travel Medical Insurance issued by Russian insurance companies are not accepted for entry into Sweden and travellers must hold a Travel Medical Insurance issued by a company outside Russia (e.g. within the EU) and that fulfils the requirements in the Visa Code.

- Business or Conference
